breadcrumb.title: Ready to reach us?
breadcrumb.desc: Fast contact channels with phone, email and location information.

panel.title: We will get back to you as quickly as possible.

map.title: Find us on the map.
map.desc: If the embedded map does not open directly, you can use the button below to open the location in Google Maps.

quickQuote.title: Contact us now for the right solution for your needs.
quickQuote.desc: For spare parts, automotive paints, industrial paints and care products, you can quickly reach us by phone, email or WhatsApp.
quickQuote.note: Faster response is available during business hours.
